name: Strawberry Lilies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the sugar, butter, cream cheese, and vanilla extract.
2. Beat on medium speed until well mixed, scraping the bowl often.
3. Reduce speed to low and add flour and salt.
4. Continue beating until well mixed.
5. Divide dough into 4 equal portions.
6. Wrap each portion in plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours until firm.
7. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F (190 degrees C).
8. On a lightly floured surface, roll out one portion of dough to 1/8-inch thick.
9. Keep remaining dough refrigerated.
10. Cut with a 2-inch round cookie cutter and place on ungreased cookie sheets about 1 inch apart.
11. Spoon 1/4 teaspoon jam onto the center of each circle and spread to within 1/4-inch of the edge.
12. With a thin spatula, fold the dough over the jam to form a lily shape and gently press the narrow end to seal.
13. Bake for 7 to 11 minutes or until edges are lightly browned.
14. Allow cookies to cool completely.
15. Sprinkle cooled cookies with powdered sugar, if desired.
